name: Herbed Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Beef stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in oil in a Dutch oven.
2. Add water, onion, seasonings, and tomato paste to the pot. Cover and simmer for 1-1/2 hours or until the meat is tender.
3. Stir in potatoes, carrots, and green pepper; simmer for an additional 30 minutes. If necessary, add more water.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients; cover and simmer for another 20 minutes.
Yield: 10 - 12 servings.
